description: Dev-time / meta layer of opencode: plan-builder skill (seven-state lifecycle + seven change modes), architecture documentation (architecture.md index + per-topic wiki + global-architecture snapshot + docs/events/), XDG/system config management with no-silent-fallback enumeration, and tweaks.cfg runtime knobs. Shipped (live as of 2026-05-04).

activities.title: Drive Plan Builder Lifecycle
activities.description: ~/projects/skills/plan-builder/. SKILL.md judgment + 9 bun-executed scripts. Drives specs/<slug>/.state.json across proposed → designed → planned → implementing → verified → living → archived, applying change modes (new / promote / amend / revise / extend / refactor / sync / archive).

activities.title: Initialize Or Migrate Spec
activities.description: plan-init.ts creates specs/<slug>/proposal.md + .state.json. plan-migrate.ts (and ensureNewFormat() on every script entry) does on-touch peaceful migration from legacy plans/<slug>/ via inferState + cp snapshot to .archive/pre-migration-YYYYMMDD/ + git mv (preserves history).

activities.title: Validate State Artifacts
activities.description: plan-validate.ts is state-aware: checks only artifacts required for current state. Missing future-state artifacts are not blockers. plan-gaps.ts produces code-independence readiness report.

activities.title: Promote Or Apply Mode
activities.description: plan-promote.ts handles forward state advance plus non-forward modes. amend (living→living), revise/extend (living→designed), refactor (living→proposed, auto-snapshot to .history/refactor-YYYY-MM-DD/), archive (living→archived). plan-rollback-refactor.ts reverses refactor.

activities.title: Sync Drift Detection
activities.description: plan-sync.ts diffs git changes against data-schema.json fields, errors.md codes, test-vectors.json cases. Drift warned not blocked (exit 0). beta-workflow invokes after every task checkbox toggle. Even clean runs append {mode:sync, result:clean} to .state.json.history.

arrows.label: operator slug + intent OR legacy plans/<slug>/ touch

activities.title: Maintain Architecture Documentation
activities.description: specs/architecture.md (~126KB cross-cutting index), per-topic wiki entries (compaction.md, session.md, provider.md, attachments.md, agent-runtime.md, meta.md), specs/_archive/global-architecture/ IDEF0+GRAFCET reverse-engineering snapshot (67 activities, 66 GRAFCET steps, 100% traceability), docs/events/event_YYYYMMDD_<topic>.md narrative log.

activities.title: Update Cross-Cutting Index
activities.description: specs/architecture.md is no longer subsystem-authoritative — it is the index pointing to per-topic wiki entries. Architecture Sync checkpoints record 'Verified (No doc changes)' or link to updated topic file.

activities.title: Project Living Specs As Wiki
activities.description: Each living-state package's source-of-truth claim is folded into specs/<topic>.md. Legacy folders remain under specs/<slug>/ until peacefully migrated to specs/_archive/.

activities.title: Append Event Log
activities.description: docs/events/event_YYYYMMDD_<topic>.md narrative for incidents and architectural shifts. plan-builder phase summary ritual writes phase-boundary entries during implementing.

activities.title: Refresh Global Snapshot On Demand
activities.description: specs/_archive/global-architecture/ is one-shot reverse engineering via miatdiagram skill. NOT regenerated per-change; updated only when user explicitly asks for a fresh codebase-wide snapshot.

activities.title: Manage XDG And System Config
activities.description: Global.Path resolves XDG with OPENCODE_DATA_HOME pin (auto-set on NODE_ENV=test to per-pid tmpdir). Config.get() loadFile→LKG snapshot fallback (~/.local/state/opencode/config-lkg.json) with HTTP 503 not 500, structured body, no raw config text. loadSplit() isolates main/providers/mcp parse failures. providerAvailability derived from accounts.json + providers.json override; legacy disabled_providers read for one cycle. AGENTS.md backup whitelist mandatory before plan implementation; restore never automatic.

activities.title: Resolve XDG Paths
activities.description: Global.Path in src/global/index.ts. Honours XDG_*_HOME; OPENCODE_DATA_HOME pins all four under <root>/{config,data,state,cache}. NODE_ENV=test auto-pins to per-pid tmpdir to prevent the 2026-04-18 accounts.json wipe recurring.

activities.title: Load Config With LKG Fallback
activities.description: config.ts loadFile() throws JsonError → log.warn + read config-lkg.json (atomic-rename written on every successful load) → return {config, configStale:true}. server/app.ts onError converts ConfigJsonError/ConfigInvalidError to HTTP 503 with {code, path, line, column, hint} body.

activities.title: Section-Isolate Sub-File Loads
activities.description: loadSplit({main, providers, mcp}). opencode.json must succeed (or LKG); providers.json failure → empty override + log.warn; mcp.json failure → MCP disabled + log.warn (lazy connect means daemon still boots).

activities.title: Backup Whitelist Snapshot
activities.description: Before plan implementation / first edit / first test command: snapshot whitelist (accounts.json mandatory + opencode/managed-apps/gauth/mcp/mcp-auth/openai-codex-accounts/models/providers/AGENTS + legacy ~/.local/share/opencode/accounts.json) to ~/.config/opencode.bak-YYYYMMDD-HHMM-<slug>/. Restore is never automatic — user requests explicitly.

arrows.label: HTTP 503 structured error or live config

activities.title: Tune Runtime Knobs Via tweaks
activities.description: /etc/opencode/tweaks.cfg INI-style operator tunables. Tweaks namespace at packages/opencode/src/config/tweaks.ts loadEffective() at module init. Missing file→defaults+log.info; invalid value→per-key default+log.warn; unknown key→log.warn skip; OPENCODE_TWEAKS_PATH env override. Cross-key invariants enforced (INV-7 tail_window_kb<=part_inline_cap_kb; ui_freshness_threshold_sec<hard_timeout; tool_output_budget_context_ratio<=1).

arrows.label: backup whitelist gate satisfied → plan may enter implementing
plan-builder phase summary triggers docs/events/ append
structured 503 on config error / runtime config
